skill_description: Bid-project scope rules for plumbing. Use when starting, triaging, validating, or packaging a commercial plumbing bid.
scope_rule: Base bid is limited to plumbing systems defined by the profile: sanitary waste and vent, domestic water, interior storm leaders, fixtures, and water heaters. Site utilities beyond 5 ft of the building, fire protection, gas piping, and equipment connections must be explicitly included, excluded, or flagged before pricing.
proposal_exclusions: site utilities beyond 5 ft of building unless listed
fire protection and fire sprinkler unless listed
